characters.name: Marshal Cullen (user's likeness)

music.prompt: spaghetti western tension build, lone whistled melody, twanging tremolo electric guitar, a distant ocarina, ominous low strings, rising dread toward a dead-silent peak, Morricone style
Ennio Morricone style western sting, a blaring trumpet and choir swell on the gunshot, then the theme resolving warm and elegiac to a final lone electric guitar chord

sfx.prompt: slow lonely church bell toll, hot dry desert wind, a creaking wooden sign, a faint distant whistle, frontier town ambience
a wooden shutter slamming shut, hurried horse hooves on dirt, a dog yelp, tense dry wind, spurs jingling
a single thunderous Colt revolver gunshot, sharp crack with a heavy echo rolling away across the open town, smoke tail
